use_cases: Quick access command palette with radial item arrangement for efficient navigation
Keyboard-driven workflows with arrow key navigation and Enter to select
Space-efficient action menus that expand on demand from a trigger button
Contextual toolbars for creative or productivity applications
ai_summary: A circular command menu component that displays selectable items in a radial arrangement around a trigger. Supports keyboard navigation with arrow keys, Enter to select, and Escape to close. Built with Framer Motion for smooth open/close animations. Ideal for quick-access tool palettes in productivity apps, code editors, or creative tools where space-efficient radial menus enhance user efficiency.
